violations.description: Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Dry goods, refrigerator and freezers were found in areas with exposed studs. Studs should be covered with smooth, nonabsorbent easily cleanable materials.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Home-style refrigerator was found at 47.4F, and dropped to 44.6F during inspection. Employee found the unit was set at 42F. Refrigerated units should be able to maintain potentially hazardous foods at 41F or below.

Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. Thermometer was not available in the home-style refrigerator in the storage area. Thermometers should be available for monitoring temperatures.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the refrigerated prep table in the kitchen was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Multiple single use items were found stored on the floor in the dry good storage areas. Single use items should be stored off of the floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Dry goods found in areas with exposed studs. Studs should be covered with smooth, nonabsorbent easily cleanable materials.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. Vegetable burritos in the home-style refrigerator were found at 47F during inspection. Potentially hazardous foods should be maintained at 41F or below. ***Burritos should be discarded.
